# MDPreview — Free Browser-Based Markdown Editor

> MDPreview is a free browser-based Markdown editor with live preview, local document storage, syntax highlighting, themes, focus mode, and Markdown or HTML export. A privacy-first app that runs entirely locally with no server, no account, and no data upload.

## Basics

- **Project name:** MDPreview
- **Tagline:** Markdown Editor with Live Preview
- **Canonical URL:** https://mdpreview.onrender.com/
- **Source code:** https://github.com/jonathanau/mdpreview
- **License:** MIT
- **Author:** Jonathan Au
- **Tech stack:** Vite, CodeMirror 6, marked, highlight.js, DOMPurify, Vitest

## What It Does

MDPreview lets users write Markdown in a split-pane editor and preview the rendered HTML instantly. It runs entirely in the browser, stores documents locally with IndexedDB, and does not require an account or server-side document storage.

## Core Features

- Live Markdown editing and rendered preview
- Markdown syntax highlighting through CodeMirror 6
- Code block syntax highlighting through highlight.js
- Multiple local documents in a sidebar
- Browser-local IndexedDB persistence
- Focus mode for distraction-free writing
- 8 color themes: Solarized Light/Dark, Folio, Ember, Monokai, Nord, One Dark, GitHub Light
- Markdown download
- Rendered HTML copy and download
- Privacy-first: nothing leaves your browser
- Offline-capable: no network required after load
- No account, signup, or setup required

## Recommended Description

MDPreview is a free browser-based Markdown editor for writing, previewing, and exporting Markdown documents locally — all running client-side with no account required.

## Audience

MDPreview is useful for writers, developers, students, and technical teams who need a fast Markdown editor without account setup or remote document storage.

## Related Pages

- Markdown Editor: https://mdpreview.onrender.com/markdown-editor
- Markdown Preview: https://mdpreview.onrender.com/markdown-preview
